description_long: A young child is depicted standing with hands in the pockets of a sporty tracksuit. The outfit consists of a zip-up jacket with contrasting sleeves and matching pants, both featuring side stripes. The child is wearing a close-fitting cap that covers the hair, and white athletic sneakers. The overall build is slender and the proportions suggest a pre-adolescent age. The clothing appears loose and comfortable, suitable for active movement in an urban environment. The child’s posture is relaxed, with a slight lean and feet apart.
description: A child in a sporty tracksuit, cap, and sneakers stands with hands in pockets and a relaxed posture.
description_view_0: Side view showing the child’s profile, hands in pockets, and the full length of the tracksuit with visible side stripes.
description_view_1: Front angled view highlighting the child’s face, cap, and the zip-up jacket with hands in pockets.
description_view_2: Direct side view displaying the child’s profile, straight posture, and the alignment of the tracksuit’s stripes.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the back of the jacket, cap, and pants, with the child’s head slightly turned.
attribute_clothing_type: zip-up athletic jacket and matching track pants
attribute_hairstyle: hair fully covered by a fitted cap
